decision_points.description: Use the vendor-recommended ampicillin concentration on the selection plates.

citations.title: NEB 5-alpha Competent E. coli
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor product page listing 100 ug/ml ampicillin for selection.

decision_points.description: Use the cited 30-second heat shock during each transformation.

citations.title: High Efficiency Transformation Protocol
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol specifying a 30-second heat shock.

decision_points.description: Allow a full 60-minute outgrowth before plating.

citations.title: High Efficiency Transformation Protocol
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol recommending 60 minutes of outgrowth.

decision_points.description: Use SOC as the outgrowth medium rather than LB.

citations.title: High Efficiency Transformation Protocol
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol noting that SOC gives roughly two-fold higher efficiency than LB.

decision_points.description: Plate a standard 50-100 uL volume onto each selection plate.

citations.title: 5 Minute Transformation Protocol
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol recommending plating 50-100 uL of transformed cells.

decision_points.description: Choose dilution factors that keep each plate within the cited countable range of 25-250 colonies.

citations.title: BAM Chapter 3: Aerobic Plate Count
citations.tier_justification: Official FDA Bacteriological Analytical Manual chapter specifying a countable range of 25-250 colonies per plate for standard plate counts.

wrong_selection_pressure.canonical_diagnosis: Ampicillin selection concentration was incorrect, so the plates are not interpretable.
acceptable_variants: The ampicillin concentration on the plate was wrong.
Selection pressure was invalid because the ampicillin concentration was not the recommended value.

citations.title: NEB 5-alpha Competent E. coli
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor product page listing the recommended ampicillin concentration for selection.
